labs.title: Prerequisites and Setup
labs.description: Set up the development environment and prerequisites for the Document API project, including installing necessary tools and configuring the environment.

labs.title: Swagger setup
labs.description: Set up Swagger for the Document API project to enable API documentation and testing.

labs.title: SQL Database and Dependency Injection
labs.description: Implement SQL database integration for the Document API and set up dependency injection for the project.

labs.title: Blob Storage Integration
labs.description: Integrate Azure Blob Storage into the Document API for storing and retrieving documents.

labs.title: Upload Happy Path
labs.description: Implement the happy path for uploading documents to the Document API, ensuring successful uploads.

labs.title: Upload Robustness
labs.description: Enhance the robustness of the upload functionality in the Document API to handle edge cases and errors.

labs.title: Download and Search Functionality
labs.description: Implement download and search functionalities in the Document API to allow users to retrieve and search for documents.

labs.title: Search Caching
labs.description: Implement caching for search results in the Document API to improve performance and reduce latency.

labs.title: Health Endpoint
labs.description: Add a health endpoint to the Document API to monitor the health and status of the application.

labs.title: Unit Testing
labs.description: Write unit tests for the Document API to ensure code quality and reliability.

labs.title: API Versioning
labs.description: Implement API versioning in the Document API to manage changes and maintain backward compatibility.

labs.title: JWT Authentication
labs.description: Implement JWT authentication in the Document API to secure access to the endpoints.

labs.title: Observability: Correlation ID and Application Insights
labs.description: Add observability features to the Document API, including correlation ID for tracing and integration with Application Insights for monitoring.

labs.title: Bonus Lab
labs.description: Provide additional challenges and exercises for the Document API project.

labs.title: Closing
labs.description: Wrap up the workshop and provide final thoughts on the Document API project.
